name: 11q13_cyclin_D1_SD
description: 11q13.3 segmental duplication-enriched region containing CCND1 (cyclin D1), FGF3, FGF4, FGF19 and the 11q13 chromosomal fragile/amplicon. Recurrent SDs and breakage-fusion-bridge events drive the 11q13 amplicon present in breast, head-and-neck, esophageal and bladder cancers.

architecture.internal_structure: Small (5-20 kb) intrachromosomal SDs around CCND1 and the FGF3/4/19 cluster; common chromosomal fragile site FRA11A nearby; somatic amplicon expanded 10-100x in tumours.

related_diseases: head and neck squamous cell carcinoma
